Great Success from our university in TUBITAK 2024/1 Research Projects Support Programme Applications

09.04.2025

A significant achievement was made as 13 out of 16 applications from our university were deemed worthy of support under the TÜBİTAK 2209-A Program.

At our university, 13 out of 16 applications were approved for support under the TÜBİTAK 2024/1 University Students Research Projects Support Program (2209-A). This notable success highlights the importance our university places on scientific research and project development.

We believe that the supported projects will greatly contribute to the research culture of our university, and we wish our researchers continued success.

What is the TÜBİTAK 2209-A Program?

The TÜBİTAK 2209-A University Students Research Projects Support Program aims to encourage undergraduate students to actively participate in scientific research processes, instill a project culture, and develop research competencies. Under this program, TÜBİTAK provides budget support for student projects deemed suitable and encourages their implementation by the students.

The full list of projects that will significantly contribute to the academic development of our university and provide our students with opportunities to enhance their research skills and scientific productivity is as follows:
